texto: There is no happiness for him who does not travel, Rohita!Thus we have heard. Living in the society of men, the best man becomes a sinner… therefore, wander!… The fortune of him who is sitting, sits; it rises when he rises; it sleeps when he sleeps; it moves when he moves. Therefore, wander!
explicacao: Citação de Aitareya Brahmanan in the Rigveda sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There is no happiness for him who does not travel, Rohita!Thus we have heard.
